title:
Sorghum and Millets Genetic Resources at ICRISAT
(Genetic Resources Progress Report 36)
abstract: One of the Major objectives of ICRISAT is to improve the genetic Potentials for grain yield and nutritional qualities of its mandate crops for the well-being of present and Future farmers in the Semi-Arid Tropics. This objective is partly realised through the  timely collection and conservation of the germplasm that is otherwise facing extinction
